calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Continued To Mar-09-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. VantreeCSR: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288.

David j. Rapson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) CIT Small Business Lending Corp.
Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Trisha L. Clark for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $ 156,006.96
Prejudgment Interest - $ 4,308.36
Attorney's Fees - $ 3,844.00
Costs - $ 618.50
Other - 5812.69 Late fees and misc. costs
Total judgment in the amount of $ 170, 590.51

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
